ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the question belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the question */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the question has received */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the question has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the question has received */,
  "accepted_answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accepted answer for the question */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the question is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_accepted_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("accepted_answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the answer is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the answer */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the answer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was last updated */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the answer has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the answer has received */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the answer is accepted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "registered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "parent_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tag (for hierarchical tagging) */,
  "tag_usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_parent_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "question_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question-tag association */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edit_history" (
  "edit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question (if applicable) */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the edit */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the edit was made */,
  "previous_content" TEXT /* Previous content before the edit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edit_history_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edit_history_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edit_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post_question, post_answer, upvote) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
